RULING: COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AP) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
David Wasserman, Esq. for Plaintiff: America Marketing Systems, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sylvia Sotomayor, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Afsaneh Valizadeh as follows:
Principal $10,000.00
Costs $225.00, for a total of $10,225.00
Judgment signed in open court.
